name: Loshen Kugel (Noodle Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except the nuts, to the egg mixture.
3. Pour into a well-oiled 2-quart casserole dish or an 8-inch baking pan.
4. Sprinkle the chopped walnuts or pecans on top.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 40 to 50 minutes, or until browned.
